monitor.capture_what: return value of get_trigger_view containing the concatenated HTML template with user input

oracle_check.condition_description: The returned HTML string contains unescaped script tags or event handler attributes, confirming that user input was concatenated without sanitization
oracle_check.raise_message_template: PY_REFLECTIVE_XSS: unescaped XSS payload in return value — captured={captured} pattern={matched_pattern}

fuzz_guidance.skip_condition: trigger is None or not isinstance(trigger, str) or len(trigger) == 0
